  • Module

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractInstruction
    Base class for all instruction implementations in the Regisermaschine.
    AdditionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer addition.
    AndCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true only if all contained conditions evaluate to true.
    AndNode
     
    ClassInstantiationException
    Thrown when a class cannot be instantiated via reflection or other dynamic mechanisms.
    ConcreteAbstractSyntaxTreeNode
     
    ConcreteCompiledInstruction
     
    ConcreteCompiledOperand
     
    ConcreteCompiledProgram
     
    ConcreteCompiler
    Concrete implementation of ICompiler for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteExecutionContext
    Default implementation of IExecutionContext used by the runtime system of the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteInstructionNode
     
    ConcreteInstructionSet
    Concrete implementations of IInstructionSet.
    ConcreteLabelNode
     
    ConcreteLexer
    Concrete implementation of ILexer for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteOperandNode
     
    ConcreteParser
    Concrete parser implementation for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteSyntaxTree
     
    ConcreteToken
     
    ConditionBuilder
     
    ConditionLexer
     
    ConditionMacroParser
     
    ConditionNode
     
    ConditionParseException
    Thrown when a condition expression cannot be parsed or is invalid.
    ConditionParser
     
    ConditionToken
     
    ConditionToken.Type
     
    ConfigInstruction
    Configuration for a single instruction in the Registermaschine runtime.
    ConfigOperand
    Configuration for a single operand in an instruction.
    ConfigurationParseException
    Thrown when a configuration file or object cannot be parsed correctly.
    CoreConfig
    Core configuration constants and global settings for the Registermaschine.
    CoreConfigParser
    Core configuration parser for the Registermaschine.
    DefectPipelineException
    Thrown when an instruction pipeline is broken or cannot be executed properly due to internal errors.
    DivisionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs sequential integer division.
    EqualsZeroCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if the IExecutionContext's zero flag is set.
    ExecutionSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of an IExecutionContext at a specific moment in time.
    Executor
    The Executor is responsible for executing a compiled program on the Registermaschine runtime environment.
    ExistingInstructionException
    Thrown when attempting to register an instruction that already exists in the instruction set.
    HaltInstruction
    Instruction that halts program execution immediately.
    ICompiledInstruction
    Represents a compiled instruction with a fixed opcode and its associated operands.
    ICompiledOperand
    Represents a compiled operand in an instruction.
    ICompiledProgram
    Represents a compiled program consisting of a sequence of compiled instructions.
    ICompiler
    Defines the contract for a compiler that transforms a parsed syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.
    ICondition
    Represents a boolean condition that can be evaluated within the context of the Registermaschine execution environment.
    IConfigEventListener
    Listener interface for receiving notifications when configuration elements are successfully parsed.
    IConfigParser
    Parser interface for processing XML-based configuration documents.
    IExecutionContext
    Represents the runtime state of a Registermaschine during program execution.
    IExecutionContextListener
    Listener interface for observing changes in an IExecutionContext.
    IInstructionSet
    Represents the instruction registry used by the Registermaschine runtime
    ILexer
    Defines the contract for a lexical analyser (lexer) that transforms source code text into a list of tokens.
    InputInstruction
    Instruction that reads an input value from the execution context and stores it in a register.
    InstructionParser
     
    IParser
    Defines the contract for a parser that transforms a sequence of tokens into a syntax tree suitable for compilation.
    ISyntaxTree
    Represents a syntax tree produced by the IParser.
    ISyntaxTreeNode
    Represents a node in a syntax tree.
    IToken
    Represents a lexical token produced by a ILexer.
    JumpInstruction
    Instruction that sets the programme counter to a specified value, effectively performing a jump in program execution.
    LeafNode
     
    LessThanZeroCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if the IExecutionContext's negative flag is set and the zero flag is not set.
    MacroNode
     
    MoveInstruction
    Instruction that moves a value into a specified register.
    MultiplicationInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer multiplication.
    NotCondition
    Condition that evaluates to the logical negation of an inner condition.
    NotNode
     
    OperandConcept
    Defines the conceptual role of a compiled operand within an instruction OperandConcept.RESULT - operand where the result of the operation is going OperandConcept.OPERAND - source operand participating in computation OperandConcept.TARGET - operand used as a jump/branch target
    OperandType
    Defines the type of compiled operand.
    OrCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if at least one contained condition evaluates to true.
    OrNode
     
    OutputInstruction
    Instruction handler that outputs a value from the execution context.
    ParsingEvent<T>
    Event object representing the successful parsing of a configuration element.
    Pipeline
    Central compilation pipeline for the Registermaschine.
    Pipeline.ParseStage
    Represents the parsing stage in the pipeline.
    Pipeline.TokenStage
    Represents the tokenisation stage in the pipeline.
    SettingsParser
     
    SubtractionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer subtraction.
    SyntaxErrorException
    Thrown when there is a syntax error in the source code.
    TokenType
    Enumerates the possible types of lexical tokens in the language.
    UnknownInstructionException
    Thrown when an instruction cannot be identified or is not registered in the current instruction set.
    XmlConstants
